name: UNION BANKSHARES INC
summary: Union Bankshares, Inc. is a Vermont-based one-bank holding company whose sole subsidiary is Union Bank, a state-chartered community bank founded in 1891. Operating 18 branch locations and three loan centers across northern Vermont and northern New Hampshire, Union Bank offers retail and commercial banking, municipal financing, SBA loans, residential and commercial real estate loans, online cash management, merchant services, and wealth management and trust services.
